notes: Wave 12 Track E candidate — final backlog item, flagged as highest-competition tier. Winnability re-verified before building, not assumed.

Date range confirmed via WebSearch: 2025-26 edition runs 1 Nov 2025 - 23 March 2026 under the slogan 'عزّك وملفاك'; 2023-24 edition ran from 12 Dec 2023 under 'أرض ترويك' and was confirmed as the 3rd official edition since the first launched in 2019 — multi-year stable institutional track record, no cancellation pattern (same reliability check applied that rejected taif-rose-festival).
At-Turaif history confirmed: capital of the First Saudi State founded 1727, UNESCO World Heritage Site #1329 since 2010 (whc.unesco.org).

Key relationship fact confirmed (wujhat.com comparison article): Diriyah Season is a heritage-focused component WITHIN the larger Riyadh Season (which spans Oct-March across 15 zones), not a separate rival season — a genuinely common point of confusion this content corrects directly, matching the disambiguation pattern used elsewhere in this wave.

Competitor check confirms this is denser competition than other Saudi seasons built this wave: ar.wikipedia.org has a dedicated article, saudipedia.com has multiple detailed per-edition articles, wujhat.com already draws the Riyadh-Season comparison. However, none of them ship a live countdown or FAQ-structured answer format — the core UX/format gap this site fills held up even against the strongest competitor found.
